title: Tender Saudi Arabian Vegetable Wrap
description: A fresh and tender Saudi Arabian dish featuring cumin seeds and leaf wrap steam, perfect for a midnight craving, this vegetarian friendly wrap is a delight to eat. It is made with a variety of vegetables and spices.
instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the toasted cumin seeds and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chopped onions and cook until they are translucent.
Add the grated carrots, sliced zucchini, and sliced bell peppers, and cook until the vegetables are tender.
Add the minced garlic, salt, and black pepper, and cook for 1 minute.
Prepare the leaf wraps by steaming them for 2 minutes.
Assemble the wraps by filling each leaf wrap with the vegetable mixture.
Serve the wraps hot and enjoy.
You can also add your favorite sauce or topping to the wrap.
Experiment with different types of leaf wraps and fillings to find your favorite combination.
